reason: Check that generated files and collected templates remain byte-identical and bundled skills keep their own frontmatter.
Check that every skill-writing platform receives the new bundled skills at the expected root.
Check that update tracking, hash keys, and idempotency expectations are preserved.
Check that updated Vitest tests follow project conventions.
Check that path keys and generated paths remain cross-platform safe.
Check implementation against the researched source map and accepted design boundaries.
